trades.reasoning: RSI at 77.9 signals overbought conditions with limited near-term upside runway; rotating capital into cleaner score-95 setups while still in modest profit territory.
Score-95 fiber-optic momentum play with RSI 66.1 firmly in the bullish-not-overbought zone, MACD bullish crossover, and price 17.8% above SMA-20 — best risk/reward in today's screener.
Score-95 industrial/defense laser name with RSI 67.9 and price 15.2% above SMA-20, offering strong technical setup with room to run before hitting overbought territory.
Score-95 telecom infrastructure play at low per-share price with RSI 61.3, providing diversified 5G exposure at lower volatility than the speculative names on the list.

decisions.briefing: Markets are drifting mildly higher in neutral territory (NASDAQ +0.2%, S&P 500 +0.3%), with no clear directional catalyst. With only $171 in cash, buying anything required freeing up capital first — NVDA is the obvious candidate given its RSI of 77.9 has pushed it into overbought territory while three score-95 candidates (AAOI, LASR, NOK) still sit in the healthy 55–70 RSI range with full momentum upside ahead.

market_education.summary_en: Equities edged marginally higher today as investors digested the recent US-China trade truce while remaining cautious about near-term growth signals. Technology and semiconductor stocks have been among the biggest beneficiaries of the tariff relief rally over the past week, but many names are now technically extended after sharp runs, causing some rotation toward earlier-stage momentum setups. The mild broad-market gains reflect a market catching its breath rather than a new leg higher.
market_education.summary_zh: 股市今日小幅收高，投資人消化近期美中貿易休戰的利多消息，同時對短期經濟成長訊號保持審慎。科技股與半導體股是上週關稅緩解行情的最大受惠者，但許多個股在急漲後技術面已過度延伸，引發部分資金轉向動能較早期、尚未超買的標的。整體市場的溫和漲勢，反映的是整理喘息而非新一波攻勢的啟動。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: When a stock's Relative Strength Index (RSI) climbs above 70, it is considered 'overbought' — the stock has risen faster than its recent historical pace and may be due for a pause or pullback. Today's NVDA sale was driven largely by its RSI of 77.9, signaling the near-term momentum edge has faded. Overbought is not an automatic sell signal, but it does mean the easy gains may be behind the stock, making it sensible to compare it against fresher setups with more runway.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 當股票的相對強弱指數（RSI）升破70，即進入「超買」狀態——意指該股的漲速已超過其近期歷史均速，可能面臨休整甚至回調。今日賣出NVDA，主因便是其RSI高達77.9，動能優勢已明顯衰退。超買並非自動觸發的賣出訊號，但代表輕鬆獲利的機會或已過去，此時將資金移往RSI更健康、仍有上漲空間的新標的，是相對合理的操作思路。
